segments.speaker: 题目21/22
segments.text: Listen to an announcement on a university radio station. Are you someone who loves writing research papers? Do you find yourself often reading something and thinking, “This could use some work”? Become a peer writing mentor. An information session will be held next Tuesday at 7 PM in the campus center. Year after year, graduating students say the writing mentor program was the biggest factor in academic success. This is a great opportunity to meet new people, make a positive impact, and gain valuable experience. See you on Tuesday.
